steps.title: Locate the key fact
steps.content: The passage directly states one measurable fact about the Hispanic Society: “has more than 18,000 objects in its museum collection.” This is the only specific claim about the institution's collection.

steps.title: Match the fact to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D says “over 18,000 objects,” which directly corresponds to “more than 18,000 objects” in the passage.

The other three either directly contradict statements in the passage (like the founding date or current location) or assert facts the text never supports (like comparative visitor numbers).

This matches choice D — D is correct.
